015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
020
021import java.lang.annotation.*;
022import java.lang.reflect.*;
023
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.svl.*;
027
028/**
029 * Utility classes and methods for the {@link SwapApply @SwapApply} annotation.
030 *
031 */
032public class SwapApplyAnnotation {
033
034   /**
035    * Prevents instantiation.
036    */
037   private SwapApplyAnnotation() {}
038
039   /**
040    * Applies targeted {@link SwapApply} annotations to a {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context.Builder}.
041    *
042    * <p>
043    * Passes the {@link SwapApply @SwapApply} annotation through to the builder's annotation list.
044    * The {@link org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.AnnotationProvider.Builder#addRuntimeAnnotations(java.util.List)}
045    * method handles unwrapping the nested {@link Swap @Swap} from {@link SwapApply#value()} and registering it
046    * under the targets specified by {@link SwapApply#on()} and {@link SwapApply#onClass()}.
047    */
048   @SuppressWarnings({
049      "rawtypes" // Raw types required for reflective annotation application.
050   })
051   public static class Applier extends AnnotationApplier<SwapApply,Context.Builder> {
052
053      /**
054       * Constructor.
055       *
056       * @param vr The resolver for resolving values in annotations.
057       */
058      public Applier(VarResolverSession vr) {
059         super(SwapApply.class, Context.Builder.class, vr);
060      }
061
062      @Override
063      public void apply(AnnotationInfo<SwapApply> ai, Context.Builder b) {
064         SwapApply a = ai.inner();
065         if (isEmptyArray(a.on()) && isEmptyArray(a.onClass()))
066            return;
067         b.annotations(a);
068      }
069   }
070
071   /**
072    * Builder class.
073    *
074    * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
075    *    <li class='jm'>{@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContext.Builder#annotations(Annotation...)}
076    * </ul>
077    */
078   public static class Builder extends AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMF {
079
080      Swap value = SwapAnnotation.DEFAULT;
081
082      /**
083       * Constructor.
084       */
085      protected Builder() {
086         super(SwapApply.class);
087      }
088
089      /**
090       * Sets the {@link SwapApply#value()} property on this annotation.
091       *
092       * @param value The new value for this property.
093       * @return This object.
094       */
095      public Builder value(Swap value) {
096         this.value = value;
097         return this;
098      }
099
100      @Override /* Overridden from AppliedAnnotationObject.Builder */
101      public Builder on(String...value) {
102         super.on(value);
103         return this;
104      }
105
106      @Override /* Overridden from AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT */
107      public Builder on(Class<?>...value) {
108         super.on(value);
109         return this;
110      }
111
112      @Override /* Overridden from AppliedOnClassAnnotationObject.Builder */
113      public Builder onClass(Class<?>...value) {
114         super.onClass(value);
115         return this;
116      }
117
118      @Override /* Overridden from AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderM */
119      public Builder on(Method...value) {
120         super.on(value);
121         return this;
122      }
123
124      @Override /* Overridden from AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderMF */
125      public Builder on(Field...value) {
126         super.on(value);
127         return this;
128      }
129
130      @Override /* Overridden from AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT */
131      public Builder on(ClassInfo...value) {
132         super.on(value);
133         return this;
134      }
135
136      @Override /* Overridden from AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderT */
137      public Builder onClass(ClassInfo...value) {
138         super.onClass(value);
139         return this;
140      }
141
142      @Override /* Overridden from AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMF */
143      public Builder on(FieldInfo...value) {
144         super.on(value);
145         return this;
146      }
147
148      @Override /* Overridden from AppliedAnnotationObject.BuilderTMF */
149      public Builder on(MethodInfo...value) {
150         super.on(value);
151         return this;
152      }
153
154      /**
155       * Instantiates a new {@link SwapApply @SwapApply} object initialized with this builder.
156       *
157       * @return A new {@link SwapApply} object.
158       */
159      public SwapApply build() {
160         return new Object(this);
161      }
162   }
163
164   @SuppressWarnings({
165      "java:S2160" // equals() inherited from AnnotationObject compares all annotation interface methods; subclass fields are accessed via those methods
166   })
167   private static class Object extends AppliedOnClassAnnotationObject implements SwapApply {
168
169      private final Swap value;
170
171      Object(SwapApplyAnnotation.Builder b) {
172         super(b);
173         value = b.value;
174      }
175
176      @Override /* Overridden from SwapApply */
177      public Swap value() {
178         return value;
179      }
180   }
181
182   /** Default value */
183   public static final SwapApply DEFAULT = create().build();
184
185   /**
186    * Instantiates a new builder for this class.
187    *
188    * @return A new builder object.
189    */
190   public static Builder create() {
191      return new Builder();
192   }
193
194   /**
195    * Instantiates a new builder for this class.
196    *
197    * @param on The targets this annotation applies to.
198    * @return A new builder object.
199    */
200   public static Builder create(Class<?>...on) {
201      return create().on(on);
202   }
203
204   /**
205    * Instantiates a new builder for this class.
206    *
207    * @param on The targets this annotation applies to.
208    * @return A new builder object.
209    */
210   public static Builder create(String...on) {
211      return create().on(on);
212   }
213
214   /**
215    * Returns <jk>true</jk> if the specified annotation contains all default values.
216    *
217    * @param a The annotation to check.
218    * @return <jk>true</jk> if the specified annotation contains all default values.
219    */
220   public static boolean empty(SwapApply a) {
221      return a == null || DEFAULT.equals(a);
222   }
223}
